rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §29.046, which governs use of funds in student education accounts. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 29.046. ACCOUNT USE RESTRICTION. (a) Money in an account assigned to a student under Section 29.045 may be used only for supplemental services and supplemental instructional materials.
_note: No conflict; the rule addresses education account fund usage restrictions, wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
